name: mcp-itglue
description: IT Glue for MSPs — documents, flexible assets, and semantic search over your documentation
long_description: MCP server for the IT Glue API. Browse organizations, read and write documents and flexible assets, and (with an OpenAI API key) run semantic vector search over your documentation — "how do I remove a backup agent" finds the right runbook even when the words don't match.

itglue_api_key.title: IT Glue API key
itglue_api_key.description: Create one in IT Glue under Account → Settings → API Keys

itglue_base_url.title: API base URL override
itglue_base_url.description: Full API base URL — leave empty to use the region default

openai_api_key.title: OpenAI API key (optional)
openai_api_key.description: Enables semantic vector search tools; leave empty to disable

itglue_advanced_toolset.title: Advanced toolset (optional)
itglue_advanced_toolset.description: Adds itglue_get / itglue_find_endpoint — read-only access to API endpoints the curated tools don't wrap. Password resources stay blocked.
